parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "company_name": "{{ $('Parse & Validate').item.json.company_name }}",
    "amount": "{{ $('Parse & Validate').item.json.amount }}",
    "currency": "{{ $('Parse & Validate').item.json.currency }}",
    "date": "{{ $('Parse & Validate').item.json.date }}",
    "category": "{{ $('Parse & Validate').item.json.category }}",
    "drive_url": "{{ $('Parse & Validate').item.json.drive_url }}",
    "drive_file_id": "{{ $('Parse & Validate').item.json.drive_file_id }}",
    "file_name": "{{ $('Parse & Validate').item.json.file_name }}",
    "processed_at": "{{ $('Parse & Validate').item.json.processed_at }}"
  },
  "message": "Invoice processed successfully"
}
